items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Investcorp Credit Management BDC reports Q1 2026 results; portfolio yield 11.95%
items.snippet: Investcorp Credit Management BDC reported Q1 2026 results, fully realizing $12.7 million in investments at a 10.67% IRR, with portfolio debt yield of 11.95%.

items.headline_ai: Investcorp Credit Management BDC hires Houlihan Lokey to advise on strategic alternatives review
items.snippet: Investcorp Credit Management BDC engaged Houlihan Lokey to assist its Special Committee of Independent Directors in reviewing strategic alternatives.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Investcorp Credit Management BDC reports Q4 2025 results; board launches strategic review, suspends dividend
items.snippet: Investcorp Credit Management BDC reported Q4 and full-year 2025 results, announced a board-led strategic alternatives review, and decided not to declare a quarterly dividend.

items.snippet: Investcorp Credit Management BDC declared a $0.12 Q4 2025 distribution and a $0.02 supplemental distribution, both payable December 12, 2025.

items.snippet: Investcorp Credit Management BDC declared a $0.12 Q1 2025 distribution payable May 16, 2025, and reported $5.1 million in new investments during the quarter.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Investcorp Credit Management BDC reports fiscal period ended December 2024; declares $0.12 distribution
items.snippet: Investcorp Credit Management BDC declared a $0.12 Q1 2025 distribution payable May 16, 2025, and reported $9.9 million in new investments at an 11.81% yield.

items.headline_ai: Investcorp Credit Management BDC appoints Suhail Shaikh CEO; Mauer becomes chairman
